items_all.title: Filing: Oracle's global workforce fell by 21,000 employees in the past 12 months to 141,000 as of May 31; the company says AI adoption has led to reductions (Brody Ford/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_original: Filing: Oracle's global workforce fell by 21,000 employees in the past 12 months to 141,000 as of May 31; the company says AI adoption has led to reductions (Brody Ford/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_en: Filing: Oracle's global workforce fell by 21,000 employees in the past 12 months to 141,000 as of May 31; the company says AI adoption has led to reductions (Brody Ford/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_zh: 文件顯示：截至 5 月 31 日，甲骨文全球員工數量在過去 12 個月內減少了 21,000 人，至 141,000 人；該公司表示，人工智慧的採用已導致減少（布羅迪福特/彭博社）
items_all.title_bilingual: 文件顯示：截至 5 月 31 日，甲骨文全球員工數量在過去 12 個月內減少了 21,000 人，至 141,000 人；該公司表示，人工智慧的採用已導致減少（布羅迪福特/彭博社） / Filing: Oracle's global workforce fell by 21,000 employees in the past 12 months to 141,000 as of May 31; the company says AI adoption has led to reductions (Brody Ford/Bloomberg)

items_all.title_original: Sources: Shanghai-based Coowa, which develops embodied AI robots, plans to file a Hong Kong IPO; Coowa was valued at $3B after raising $600M in its latest round (Jiahui Huang/Wall Street Journal)
items_all.title_en: Sources: Shanghai-based Coowa, which develops embodied AI robots, plans to file a Hong Kong IPO; Coowa was valued at $3B after raising $600M in its latest round (Jiahui Huang/Wall Street Journal)
items_all.title_zh: 資料來源：總部位於上海的 Coowa，一家開發實體人工智慧機器人的公司，計劃在香港首次公開募股； Coowa 在最新一輪融資 6 億美元後估值為 30 億美元（Jiahui Huang/華爾街日報）
items_all.title_bilingual: 資料來源：總部位於上海的 Coowa，一家開發實體人工智慧機器人的公司，計劃在香港首次公開募股； Coowa 在最新一輪融資 6 億美元後估值為 30 億美元（Jiahui Huang/華爾街日報） / Sources: Shanghai-based Coowa, which develops embodied AI robots, plans to file a Hong Kong IPO; Coowa was valued at $3B after raising $600M in its latest round (Jiahui Huang/Wall Street Journal)

items_all_raw.title: Sources: Shanghai-based Coowa, which develops embodied AI robots, plans to file a Hong Kong IPO; Coowa was valued at $3B after raising $600M in its latest round (Jiahui Huang/Wall Street Journal)
items_all_raw.title_original: Sources: Shanghai-based Coowa, which develops embodied AI robots, plans to file a Hong Kong IPO; Coowa was valued at $3B after raising $600M in its latest round (Jiahui Huang/Wall Street Journal)
items_all_raw.title_en: Sources: Shanghai-based Coowa, which develops embodied AI robots, plans to file a Hong Kong IPO; Coowa was valued at $3B after raising $600M in its latest round (Jiahui Huang/Wall Street Journal)
items_all_raw.title_zh: 資料來源：總部位於上海的 Coowa，一家開發實體人工智慧機器人的公司，計劃在香港首次公開募股； Coowa 在最新一輪融資 6 億美元後估值為 30 億美元（Jiahui Huang/華爾街日報）
items_all_raw.title_bilingual: 資料來源：總部位於上海的 Coowa，一家開發實體人工智慧機器人的公司，計劃在香港首次公開募股； Coowa 在最新一輪融資 6 億美元後估值為 30 億美元（Jiahui Huang/華爾街日報） / Sources: Shanghai-based Coowa, which develops embodied AI robots, plans to file a Hong Kong IPO; Coowa was valued at $3B after raising $600M in its latest round (Jiahui Huang/Wall Street Journal)
